hypothesis: Concrete eBPF Bytecode Modification:** Attach an eBPF `uprobe` to the sorting algorithm's block-processing loop. Modify the eBPF bytecode to utilize `bpf_perf_event_read_value()` to sample CPU counters. Based on the entropy threshold, the eBPF program updates a shared `BPF_MAP_TYPE_ARRAY`. The sorting algorithm reads this map to execute a computed `goto` (or function pointer swap), bypassing standard conditional branching. The eBPF bytecode explicitly replaces standard `BPF_JMP` evaluation with a direct `BPF_STX` (store) of the optimal strategy index into the shared map memory space, ensuring zero-overhead context switching.
